paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces intra-layer model parallelism in transformers using targeted modifications to PyTorch, enabling efficient training of models up to 8.3 billion parameters on 512 GPUs
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, downstream task performance (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE), language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of training very large language models due to memory constraints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on downstream tasks (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces intra-layer model parallelism in transformers using targeted modifications to PyTorch, enabling efficient training of models up to 8.3 billion parameters on 512 GPUs
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, downstream task performance (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE), language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of training very large language models due to memory constraints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on downstream tasks (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Megatron-LM: Training Multi-Billion Parameter Language Models Using Model Parallelism

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces intra-layer model parallelism in transformers using targeted modifications to PyTorch, enabling efficient training of models up to 8.3 billion parameters on 512 GPUs. Careful arrangement of layer normalization and residual connections enables stable training of larger BERT-style models
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, downstream task performance (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE), language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability of training very large language models due to memory constraints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on downstream tasks (MNLI, QQP, SQuAD, RACE)
